creator: ljuba.bsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 189043
FDP Primer, Chapter 1, Section 1.1 Overview improvement.

FDP Primer, Chapter 1, Section 1.1 Overview contains a sentence "The Subversion package is needed to obtain a working of the documentation and generate patches with." which should be "The Subversion package is needed to obtain a working copy of the documentation and generate patches with."

Other changes included in diff are merely cleaning up badly formed lines to make _igor_ silent.

Proposed changes are tested locally, build works as expected.

-ljuba
